data.title: Nasdaq falls by 50 points, records weekly loss, investor sentiment at 'Fear' level due to inflation report. Indices down by 1.2%-2.1%.
data.description: The Fear and Greed index by CNN Money indicated a decrease in market sentiment, remaining in the "Fear" zone on Friday. U.S. stocks had a mixed settlement, with the Nasdaq Composite dropping approximately 50 points post the inflation report. The annual inflation rate fell from 2.7% to 2.4% in January, below the expected 2.5%, marking the lowest figure since May 2025. Core inflation, excluding food and energy, also decreased from 2.7% to 2.5% year over year, hitting the lowest level since March 2021. Major indices experienced losses for the week - the S&P 500 declined by 1.4%, the Dow by 1.2%, and the Nasdaq by 2.1%. Applied Materials Inc. (NASDAQ: AMAT) saw an 8% increase in its stock after a successful quarterly report.

data.title: Inventiva released preliminary 2025 financial results on Feb 17, 2026, highlighting cash reserves, revenue for the year.
data.description: Daix in France and New York City, New York, USA, February 17, 2026 – Inventiva (IVA), a biopharmaceutical company listed on Euronext Paris and Nasdaq, disclosed preliminary unaudited financial figures for the year ended December 31, 2025. The Company highlighted key metrics such as cash reserves, cash equivalents, and revenues, pertaining to its focus on developing oral therapies for metabolic dysfunction-associated steatohepatitis (MASH).

data.title: Essity's Capital Markets Day on May 7, 2026 in Gothenburg, Sweden with President Ulrika Kolsrud & team. 09:00 - 14:00 CET.
data.description: Mark your calendars for May 7, 2026, when Essity will host its Capital Markets Day at its Gothenburg, Sweden office. Taking place from 09:00 to around 14:00 CET, the event will feature President and CEO Ulrika Kolsrud, along with key members of the Executive Management Team. This announcement was made in Stockholm on February 17, 2026.

data.title: Sinch's Q4 2025 net sales reach SEK 6,756m, with 3% organic decrease and currency impact of 10%. Financial performance solidifies.
data.description: In its latest report, Sinch AB (publ) based in Stockholm disclosed the financial results for the fourth quarter and full year of 2025. During October to December 2025, the company reported net sales of SEK 6,756 million, representing a 3 percent organic decrease compared to the previous period. Negative currency effects further impacted the results by 10 percent. This marks a notable shift in the company's financial performance for the specified period.

data.title: CoinShares, a global asset manager specializing in digital assets, announces Q4 2025 update.
data.description: On February 17, 2026, in Saint Helier, Jersey, CoinShares International Limited, a leading global asset manager focusing on digital assets, released its quarterly update for the period ending on December 31, 2025. The company, listed on Nasdaq Stockholm under CS and on US OTCQX as CNSRF, provided insights into its performance during this timeframe.

data.title: Sasol Limited announces changes in board directors, complying with JSE Listings Requirements.
data.description: On February 17, 2026, in accordance with section 6.71 of the JSE Listings Requirements and section 6.42 of the JSE Debt and Specialist Securities Listings Requirements, shareholders and noteholders have been informed about a recent alteration to the board of directors. The details of this update have been communicated to ensure transparency and compliance within the organization.

data.title: FXPesa supports literacy in Tanzania by funding a local school through CR Hope Foundation in under-resourced community.
data.description: In Nairobi, Kenya, on February 17, 2026, FXPesa, the inaugural CMA-licensed broker in the country supported by Equiti Group, is aiding in providing educational opportunities for children in an underserved community in Tanzania. The assistance involves funding a school run by the CR Hope Foundation. This initiative...

data.title: SAP executive to join investor event in Q1 2026. Details to be shared through webcast and replay on SAP IR website.
data.description: SAP SE, based in Walldorf, Germany, disclosed on Feb. 17, 2026, that their executive will be partaking in an upcoming event. The event will be live-streamed and a replay will be accessible on the SAP Investor Relations site soon after. SAP is listed on NYSE under the symbol SAP.

data.title: Optiml accelerates Real Estate Decision Intelligence category. Announcement of enterprise adoption and market expansion.
data.description: On February 17, 2026, Optiml, a spin-off from ETH Zurich, operating in Zurich and London, revealed significant progress with its Real Estate Decision Intelligence (REDI) software. The platform is gaining traction among enterprises, leading to an increase in adoption rates. In addition, Optiml is expanding its product offerings and venturing into new markets to meet growing demand. This development highlights the success of the company and underscores the importance of its REDI platform in the rapidly evolving real estate sector.
